title: FunkFantasy Online
description: Enter FunkFiction Online, a challenging modpack  for use with the FFO server which offers revamped combat, some engineering, and above all else, exploration!
body: FunkFantasy Online is a modpack designed for the FFO server. It is focused on delivering an exploration and progression heavy experience set in a lush and dynamic world. Experience bossfights, legendary weapons, and creatures of all shapes and sizes.
